news.title: New Road Development Project Begins
news.content: Construction work on the main village road has officially started. The project aims to improve connectivity and ease of travel for all residents. Expected completion is within three months.
news.author: Village Council

news.title: Welcome to Sehra Village Website
news.content: We are proud to launch the official website for Sehra Village. This platform will serve as a hub for all village news, events, and community updates. Stay connected with your roots and fellow villagers through this digital home.
news.author: Village Council

gallery.title: Sehra Village Landscape
gallery.description: A beautiful view of our village surrounded by the green hills of AJK.

gallery.title: Village Mosque
gallery.description: The historic mosque at the heart of Sehra Village community.

gallery.title: Golden Farmlands
gallery.description: The fertile farmlands of Sehra Village during harvest season.

mainCards.title: Historic Mosque
mainCards.description: The spiritual and social heart of our community, a place of worship and gathering for generations.

mainCards.title: Golden Farmlands
mainCards.description: Rich agricultural fields sustaining families through wheat, rice, and fresh vegetables.

mainCards.title: Village School
mainCards.description: Dedicated to educating the next generation of Sehra's children with quality learning.

notice.title: Notice
notice.content: Welcome to the official Sehra Village website. Stay tuned for important announcements.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Event
upcoming.content: Community meeting scheduled. Details will be announced soon.
